stack.content: MDX-only marketing content with frontmatter schemas
stack.auth: NextAuth/Auth.js (credentials provider) OR custom cookie-session auth; pick one and implement cleanly

hard_rules: Build module-by-module following the phase order in PRD.
No partial files: every referenced file must be fully created.
Marketing content must be MDX-only under /content; no CMS.
All sensitive keys must be read from environment variables; never hardcode secrets.
All Flutterwave webhook handlers must verify signatures/hash and be idempotent.
All user input must be validated server-side with zod.
All protected portal routes must enforce RBAC.

phases.name: Phase 0 - Foundations
deliverables: Next.js App Router scaffold with TS
Tailwind + shadcn/ui configured
Core layout: header/footer, responsive nav
MDX pipeline with frontmatter parsing and validation
SEO: metadata helpers, sitemap.ts, robots.ts
Analytics event utility (no vendor lock-in)

phases.name: Phase 1 - Marketing Site (MDX-only)
deliverables: Routes: /, /about, /services, /services/[slug], /case-studies, /case-studies/[slug], /blog, /blog/[slug], /contact, /privacy, /terms
MDX components: CTA, FeatureGrid, PricingTable, FAQ, Stats, Testimonial, Gallery, ProcessTimeline
Pricing guidance on each service page (Starter/Growth/Enterprise ranges in GHS)
Contact: call booking section + structured enquiry form with server validation and rate limiting
Newsletter: subscribe/unsubscribe with double opt-in and tokenized confirmation

phases.name: Phase 2 - Portal MVP (Auth + Projects + Tickets)
deliverables: Auth: signup, email verify, login, logout, reset password
RBAC roles: CLIENT_USER, CLIENT_ADMIN, SUPPORT, PM, FINANCE, ADMIN
Client dashboard pages: /portal, /portal/projects, /portal/projects/[id], /portal/support, /portal/support/[ticketId]
Ticketing: create/reply/status/attachments; notification triggers email+SMS
Projects: project + milestones read view; admin PM update UI

phases.name: Phase 3 - One-time Billing (Invoices + Flutterwave)
deliverables: Catalog for one-time services and add-ons
Invoice creation UI for admin finance
Client invoice view + 'Pay Now' button using Flutterwave hosted checkout
Webhook endpoint verifies Flutterwave signature/hash and marks invoice paid
Receipt page and email+SMS confirmations

phases.name: Phase 4 - Subscriptions (Recurring via invoice-per-cycle)
deliverables: Subscription plans: hosting, care plans, SLA support, domain management
Subscription lifecycle: active/past_due/cancelled/ended
Scheduler job: generate renewal invoice and send reminders
Client subscription management UI
Failed payment notifications and retries (manual in v1)

phases.name: Phase 5 - Chatbot
deliverables: Public chatbot widget with curated intents (services, pricing guidance, contact)
Client-aware chatbot mode when logged in (ticket creation, invoice lookup, project status summary)
Escalation options to human support

quality_checks: Build-time validation: MDX frontmatter required fields; unique slugs
Unit tests for webhook verification and idempotency helper
E2E happy path: signup -> verify -> login -> create ticket -> admin reply -> invoice pay -> receipt
Security: rate limit auth/contact endpoints; strict file upload allowlist

documentation: README.md with local setup, env vars, scripts, seed steps
API docs (short) for key endpoints: webhook, payments init, tickets
seed_data: seed sample projects and tickets (dev only)
